calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-23-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Fare Restaurant Group LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, dba American Fare PDQ.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

Ryan Dahm, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Performance Food Group, Inc., a Foreign Corporation, dba Performance Foodservice.
No appearance by defendant Fare Restaurant Group LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, dba American Fare PDQ.
Plaintiff's complaint for Open Book Account/Goods Sold and Delivered was filed on August 8, 2018.
Substitute service on defendant Fare Restaurant Group LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, dba American Fare PDQ, took place on August 19, 2018, and was effectuated on August 31, 2019.
Default was entered as to defendant are Restaurant Group LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, dba American Fare PDQ, on November 16, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on March 20, 2019.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed April 22, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Performance Food Group, Inc., a Foreign Corporation, dba Performance Foodservice, and against the Defaulted Defendant Fare Restaurant Group LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, dba American Fare PDQ, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $88,488.12.
Prejudgment Interest - $6,229.68.
Attorney Fees - $1,000.00.
Costs - $600.00.

Total - $96,317.80.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-01-2019 Continued

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-28-2019 Continued To Mar-05-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-21-2018 Continued To May-08-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
